text: Spin-off into an existing .bowman (integrate spun-off aims as free-floating)
description: Deferred remainder of the basic spin-off. When the chosen target path already contains a .bowman, the basic version only warns and stops. Extend it to allow proceeding: merge the spun-off aims into the existing target graph as free-floating aims (no parents) so the user can reparent them into the target's structure. Handle ID collisions. Postponed until basic spin-off lands.
